# Favicon Checker Tool

> A comprehensive favicon toolkit: check, audit, generate, convert, and monitor favicons for any website.

## Technical Details
This is a serverless application built on Cloudflare Workers using Nuxt 4 and Vue. It performs synchronous server-side requests to inspect target URLs directly for all `<link rel="icon">`, `<link rel="apple-touch-icon">`, and web app manifest declarations to bypass local caching.

## Endpoints
- `/` - The main single-URL checker tool with audit scoring.
- `/batch` - Bulk favicon checking tool accepting JSON arrays, comma-separated, or newline-delimited URL inputs.
- `/check/{domain}` - Per-domain favicon report pages (e.g. `/check/github.com`). SSR-rendered with cached results.
- `/guide` - Complete favicon guide: sizes, formats, implementation, dark mode, common mistakes.
- `/generator` - Upload an image, get all favicon sizes as PNG + ZIP download. Client-side.
- `/gallery` - Curated gallery of best favicon designs by industry.
- `/trends` - Live data dashboard of favicon format adoption across checked domains.
- `/monitor` - Track favicon changes for domains in a localStorage watchlist.
- `/tools/ico-to-png` - Convert ICO files to PNG format (client-side).
- `/tools/svg-to-favicon` - Convert SVG to all favicon sizes (client-side).
- `/tools/favicon-size-checker` - Analyze favicon dimensions, format, and transparency.
- `/compare/realfavicongenerator` - Feature comparison vs RealFaviconGenerator.
- `/compare/favicon-io` - Feature comparison vs favicon.io.

## API
- `GET /api/favicon?url={url}` - Check a single URL's favicons. Returns JSON with `url`, `favicons[]`, `auditScore`, `auditGrade`, `auditChecks[]`, and `checkedAt`.
- `GET /api/domain/{domain}` - Retrieve cached favicon results for a previously checked domain.
- `GET /api/stats/trends` - Aggregated favicon adoption statistics from all checked domains.

## Access
Accessible freely. Rate limited to 10 checks per minute per IP. Contact @narduk-enterprises for rate limit extension inquiries.
